title: Remove settings from Iceberg table column SEGV
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce, everything in ClickHouse. It could be related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/86024 , but here is a SEGV, and it's related to the column settings.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/t0/');
ALTER TABLE t0 MODIFY COLUMN c0 REMOVE SETTINGS;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
[ip-172-31-18-156] 2025.08.28 09:40:38.924922 [ 608699 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: ########################################
[ip-172-31-18-156] 2025.08.28 09:40:38.924997 [ 608699 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: (version 25.9.1.422 (official build), build id: EBBCC0181FD3C7AA344E9FE87E288EB62E26650E, git hash: 3c22bafe64bedca53b83062c5be4f17aef82cfb2) (from thread 608701) (query_id: a038c08f-360d-465f-bf96-1d3f8ea362dc) (query: ALTER TABLE t0 MODIFY COLUMN c0 REMOVE SETTINGS;) Received signal Segmentation fault (11)
[ip-172-31-18-156] 2025.08.28 09:40:38.925028 [ 608699 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: Address: NULL pointer. Access: read. Address not mapped to object.
[ip-172-31-18-156] 2025.08.28 09:40:38.925056 [ 608699 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: Stack trace: 0x0000561a1fd93ff8 0x0000561a1fd22de6 0x0000561a1fd58f1a 0x0000561a1fce526e 0x0000561a1dcfd773 0x0000561a1fb38d30 0x0000561a216552b3 0x0000561a2165214d 0x0000561a21a11e62 0x0000561a21a0bb45 0x0000561a2538c80f 0x0000561a253a66a4 0x0000561a2d633907 0x0000561a2d633ee5 0x0000561a2d5d30bf 0x0000561a2d5d0791 0x00007270a6ea27f1 0x00007270a6f33c9c

[ip-172-31-18-156] 2025.08.28 09:40:39.020696 [ 608699 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: 4. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergWrites.cpp:925: DB::MetadataGenerator::generateModifyColumnMetadata(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IDataType const>) @ 0x0000000019a8cde6

[ip-172-31-18-156] 2025.08.28 09:40:39.220720 [ 608699 ] <Fatal> BaseDaemon: 7. ./src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:161: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageLocalConfiguration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::alter(DB::AlterCommands const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000017a67773
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 FLOAT) PRIMARY KEY (c1);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c3 INT, c4 INT NULL, c5 DATE) PRIMARY KEY (c3);
UPDATE t2 SET c4 = NULL WHERE c4 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE t0 MODIFY COLUMN c0 REMOVE SETTINGS
